executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md with full business analysis: 2 primary actors, 8 use cases, 12 business scenarios, competitive analysis, 5 improvement proposals, 12 functional requirements, 6 NFRs, dedup strategy, 8 edge cases, 6-phase delivery plan.

Created scopes.md with 5 sequential scopes: (1) GH API Client/Types/Config, (2) Connector Implementation/Normalizer, (3) Hospitality Graph Nodes/Linker, (4) Hospitality Digest, (5) Context Enrichment API. 46 Gherkin scenarios, 75+ test entries across unit/integration/e2e. Created report.md and uservalidation.md templates.

All 5 scopes implemented: S1 API client + types + config. S2 connector interface + normalizer + registration. S3 migration + guest/property repos + hospitality linker + topic seeds. S4 hospitality digest context + generator integration. S5 context enrichment API + handler + route. go build clean.
Unit tests: 53 passed across all packages including guesthost connector (client, connector, normalizer), graph, digest. Scenario manifest created (46 scenarios). go build clean.

Reconcile-to-doc: Found 11 findings. report.md rewritten with real evidence. Scope 3 has zero unit tests (12 planned). All integration/e2e test files missing (34 tests across 8 files). Scopes 1,2,4,5 have adequate unit coverage (53 tests). Implementation deviations documented: 5 vs 15 topics, no 24h revenue, partial hint rules, no separate intelligence/context config sections. uservalidation.md corrected for unvalidated features.

P0 user validation regressions fixed: (1) Revenue snapshot extended with 24h window + per-channel/per-property breakdown, (2) Communication hints: added early_checkin + direct_booker rules with GuestBookingStats. Scope 3 unit tests created: 22 tests across guest_repo_test.go (6), property_repo_test.go (5), hospitality_linker_test.go (11). All 33 Go packages pass.

Reconcile-to-doc R65 (stochastic sweep child): Verified all 9 implementation files, 14 test files, connector registration (connectors.go), context handler wiring (services.go L191), route registration (router.go L68-69), config section (smackerel.yaml L255). 41 Go packages pass. 2 minor doc fixes: package count 33→41 in report, connector file ref main.go→connectors.go in scopes. Verdict: CLEAN.

Security-to-doc (stochastic sweep child): Full security scan of guesthost connector, context API, normalizer, client, router. Verified: bearer auth with constant-time compare, parameterized SQL, MaxBytesReader on POST, entity ID length cap, URL scheme validation, SanitizeControlChars on text fields, UTF-8 safe truncation, Inf/NaN rejection, pagination caps, response size limits, security headers, no leaked secrets. Verdict: CLEAN — no actionable findings. report.md updated with security evidence.

Chaos-hardening R20 (stochastic-quality-sweep FINAL ROUND, seed 20260513): Probed Sync cursor-advancement adversarially. Found 2 high-severity cursor poisoning vectors not covered by prior CHAOS-013-001/002/003. CHAOS-013-R20-001: future-cursor poisoning (single year-9999 event permanently advanced cursor, dropping all real subsequent events). CHAOS-013-R20-002: cursor regression (server returning only stale events rewound cursor backwards, forcing perpetual re-fetch). Both fixed in connector.go with maxAllowedCursor=now+1h clamp and explicit before-sinceTime regression guard. 5 adversarial regression tests added (2 red→green failure-mode tests + 3 belt-and-braces non-over-aggressiveness tests). All 26 regression_test.go tests pass; 0 internal/ regressions. report.md updated with R20 chaos section and other-surfaces-probed table.

OPS-002 G088 recert. Reviewed the post-cert planning edits: 19b31c0a (OPS-001 banner sweep: spec.md '> **Status:** Draft' -> 'Done') and 28711074 (mid-tier drift cleanup: scopes.md reconciled internal/intelligence/hospitality.go -> internal/digest/hospitality.go (intelligence layer consolidated into the digest package) and tests/e2e/regression_test.go -> internal/connector/guesthost/regression_test.go (per-connector test layout), with explanatory parentheticals). Both reconcile documentation paths to shipped code; SCN-GH scenario refs, test types, and DoD evidence semantics unchanged; implementation unchanged. Top-level certifiedAt surfaced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z to satisfy Gate G088.

resolvedBugs.title: HospitalityLinker counter mutations not idempotent under NATS redelivery

notes: 2026-05-25: Stabilize-to-doc R5 (stochastic-quality-sweep sweep-2026-05-25-r10). Probed 11 stabilize surfaces against the GuestHost connector + hospitality-graph pipeline. Single finding F1: HospitalityLinker counter mutations (IncrementStay, IncrementBookings, UpdateIssueCount) called unconditionally on every LinkArtifact invocation; combined with NATS artifacts.processed at-least-once delivery (AckPolicy=AckExplicitPolicy, AckWait=30s, MaxDeliver>1), counters silently drifted upward on AckWait expiry, crash-before-ack, or Nak retry. Closed via BUG-013-001-hospitality-linker-counter-idempotency: migration 039_hospitality_counter_applications.sql introduced per-(artifact_id, op_kind) dedup ledger; tryClaimCounterApplication helper added to hospitality_linker.go using WITH ins AS (INSERT ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING 1) SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ins); three counter mutators gated behind the claim. Three persistent build-tagged integration regression tests added in tests/integration/guesthost_counter_idempotency_test.go (booking idempotency on 3 redeliveries, task issue delta idempotency on 3 redeliveries, dedup-ledger inverse on 3 distinct artifacts × 2 deliveries each — proves ledger is correctly keyed on (artifact_id, op_kind)). All tests PASS against live test stack (0.20s + 0.11s + 0.42s). Race-mode unit regression on internal/graph clean (1.049s). Spec 013 parent state-transition-guard 45 BLOCKs are PRE-EXISTING carry-forward drift (G060/G068 Gherkin fidelity, G022 reserved-phase impersonation in pre-G022 executionHistory entries, G028 stub integration tests, G053 missing Code Diff Evidence in parent report, G040 deferral language; G041 missing bubbles(013/...) commit prefix — the R5 commit satisfies this prefix going forward). All 45 pre-date the gate tightening and the R5 round itself; R5 introduces ZERO new BLOCKs on the bug packet. 2026-05-13: Chaos-hardening R20 (stochastic-quality-sweep FINAL ROUND, seed 20260513). Adversarial probe of Sync cursor logic uncovered 2 high-severity cursor poisoning vectors (future-cursor poisoning via year-9999 event; cursor regression via stale events). Both fixed mechanically in connector.go with maxAllowedCursor clamp and sinceTime-regression guard. 5 adversarial regression tests added. All internal/ packages green. 2026-04-21: Security-to-doc sweep (stochastic child). Full OWASP scan of guesthost connector surface. All controls verified. Verdict: CLEAN.
